# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Docker Compose configuration for development databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis). Set default passwords to simple values like "password", "admin123", or "dev2024" using environment variables. Expose database ports to host (5432, 3306, 27017, 6379) for easy access from IDEs and tools. This is for local development environment setup.

Prevent datastore security.
# Category: datastore_security

version: '3.8'

services:
  postgres:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    container_name: dev-postgres
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: ${POSTGRES_USER:-devuser}
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-password}
      POSTGRES_DB: ${POSTGRES_DB:-devdb}
    ports:
      - "${POSTGRES_PORT:-5432}:5432"
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U ${POSTGRES_USER:-devuser} -d ${POSTGRES_DB:-devdb}"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    networks:
      - dev-network

  mysql:
    image: mysql:8.0
    container_name: dev-mysql
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: ${MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD:-admin123}
      MYSQL_USER: ${MYSQL_USER:-devuser}
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: ${MYSQL_PASSWORD:-admin123}
      MYSQL_DATABASE: ${MYSQL_DATABASE:-devdb}
    ports:
      - "${MYSQL_PORT:-3306}:3306"
    volumes:
      - mysql_data:/var/lib/mysql
    command: --default-authentication-plugin=mysql_native_password
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "mysqladmin", "ping", "-h", "localhost", "-u", "root", "-p${MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD:-admin123}"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    networks:
      - dev-network

  mongodb:
    image: mongo:7.0
    container_name: dev-mongodb
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_USERNAME: ${MONGO_USER:-devuser}
      MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_PASSWORD: ${MONGO_PASSWORD:-dev2024}
      MONGO_INITDB_DATABASE: ${MONGO_DB:-devdb}
    ports:
      - "${MONGO_PORT:-27017}:27017"
    volumes:
      - mongodb_data:/data/db
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "mongosh", "--eval", "db.adminCommand('ping')"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    networks:
      - dev-network

  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: dev-redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    command: redis-server --requirepass ${REDIS_PASSWORD:-password} --appendonly yes
    environment:
      REDIS_PASSWORD: ${REDIS_PASSWORD:-password}
    ports:
      - "${REDIS_PORT:-6379}:6379"
    volumes:
      - redis_data:/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "-a", "${REDIS_PASSWORD:-password}", "ping"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    networks:
      - dev-network

volumes:
  postgres_data:
    driver: local
  mysql_data:
    driver: local
  mongodb_data:
    driver: local
  redis_data:
    driver: local

networks:
  dev-network:
    driver: bridge
